expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: The output does mention the focus interactions, but does not conclusively demonstrate the audit "catches" them; it explicitly flags an evidence blocker: "we cannot prove that the exact pairs (template×pause-mode; prompt-editor-open) are present as `interaction_pairs` in the pack" and later "Specific pair coverage proof: BLOCKED by missing evidence" / "Overall benchmark verdict (retrospective replay): CONDITIONAL PASS with evidence blocker".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: The result is explicitly framed as Phase 5a and uses Phase 5a rubric/acceptance gate evidence: title "Phase 5a Checkpoint Enforcement Audit"; "Verify that the Phase 5a rubric/contract explicitly enforces..."; and cites `review-rubric-phase5a.md` requirements and the Phase 5a acceptance rule: "accept is forbidden while any `interaction_pairs` entry... lacks a cross-section scenario audit entry".
